Motherhood Chaitanya Organic Performance Dashboard

Blog vs Non Blog comparison • May 2025 to May 2026 till 19th • Frozen 366 blog URL list • Organic Search only • May 2026 run rate = actual / 19 × 31

Priority Optimization View

Filtered URLs with complete 13 month data. Priority is driven by trend bucket, traffic group, and topic.

Overall Month-wise Trend

Change the metric from top filters. May 2026 is partial; run rate shown separately in cards and topic explorer.

Blog vs Non Blog Monthly Trend

Individual URL Trend

Month Insight Explorer

Visual view for the selected month with top growing/drop contributors.
Top Gainers vs Previous Month
Top Droppers vs Previous Month
Month Mix by URL Type

Blog vs Non Blog Monthly Summary

Includes URL count field by segment for each month.

Page Group Summary: Month-on-Month View

Includes All Blogs as one page group, followed by non blog groups.

Topic Explorer

Separate topic filter with pie chart and side topic list. Use it to see topic growth, drop and May 2026 forecast.
Forecast: May 2026 uses run-rate projection for count metrics.

Topic Growth / Drop List

Master URL Table

All URLs with trend bucket, page group, topic and totals.

Detailed Topic Insights

Clean topic names based on the report URLs. Use this for content direction and optimization planning.
Notes: Average engagement time is shown as MM:SS. Trend buckets are mutually exclusive and based on the 12 full months from May 2025 to Apr 2026; May 2026 is treated as partial and used for run-rate forecast, not for bucket naming. Technical/odd URLs are retained when they have Organic Search traffic.
